title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'appcrawler4@gmail.com' into the email input field. | Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main screen.

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'invalidemail@gmail.com' into the email input field. | Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the credentials are invalid.

title: Login with empty email field
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email field is required.

title: Login with empty password field
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'appcrawler4@gmail.com' into the email input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the password field is required.

title: Login with invalid email format
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'appcrawler4.com' into the email input field. | Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Sign in' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid.

title: Login with 'Skip' button
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'appcrawler4@gmail.com' into the email input field. | Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Skip' button.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the main screen without logging in.

title: Login with empty email field and 'Skip' button
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'password123' into the password input field. | Tap the 'Skip' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email field is required.

title: Login with empty password field and 'Skip' button
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Enter 'appcrawler4@gmail.com' into the email input field. | Tap the 'Skip' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the password field is required.
